languages.text: {n}Рука Себериана оказывается в генозамке, хорошо знакомом вам по временам бунта на корабле, забравшего жизнь Теодоры и разоблачившего предательство Кунрада. Вы видите, как меняется цвет жидкости, текущей по пластиковым венам вашего предка. Глаза сервитора оживают, и двери в Камеру Патента начинают открываться.{/n}

{n}Seberian inserts his hand into the gene-lock you remember well from the time of the mutiny on the ship that claimed Theodora's life and laid Kunrad's treachery bare. You see the liquid coursing through your ancestor's plasteen veins change colour. The servitor's eyes come alive, and the doors of the Warrant Chamber begin to open.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Рука Себериана оказывается в генозамке, хорошо знакомом вам по временам бунта на корабле, забравшего жизнь Теодоры и разоблачившего предательство Кунрада. Вы видите, как меняется цвет жидкости, текущей по пластиковым венам вашего предка. Глаза сервитора оживают, и двери в Камеру Патента начинают открываться.{/n}

You see the liquid coursing through your ancestor's plasteen veins change colour. The servitor's eyes come alive, and the doors of the Warrant Chamber begin to open.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian legt seine Hand in das Genschloss, das du aus der Zeit kennst, als die Meuterei auf dem Schiff Theodora das Leben kostete und Kunrads Verrat aufdeckte. Du siehst, wie die Flüssigkeit in den Plasteen-Adern deines Ahnherren die Farbe wechselt. Die Augen des Servitors erwachen zum Leben und die Türen der Handelsbriefkammer öffnen sich.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian inserts his hand into the gene-lock you remember well from the time of the mutiny on the ship that claimed Theodora's life and laid Kunrad's treachery bare. You see the liquid coursing through your ancestor's plasteen veins change colour. The servitor's eyes come alive, and the doors of the Warrant Chamber begin to open.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian legt seine Hand in das Genschloss, das du aus der Zeit kennst, als die Meuterei auf dem Schiff Theodora das Leben kostete und Kunrads Verrat aufdeckte. Du siehst, wie die Flüssigkeit in den Plasteen-Adern deines Ahnherren die Farbe wechselt. Die Augen des Servitors erwachen zum Leben und die Türen der Handelsbriefkammer öffnen sich.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian insère la main dans le verrou génétique, dont vous ne risquez plus d'oublier l'existence depuis la mutinerie ayant coûté la vie à Théodora et levé le voile sur la trahison de Kunrad. Le liquide qui s'écoule dans les veines synthétiques de votre ancêtre change de couleur. Les yeux du servitor s'animent, et les portes de la salle de la lettre de marque commencent à s'ouvrir.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian inserts his hand into the gene-lock you remember well from the time of the mutiny on the ship that claimed Theodora's life and laid Kunrad's treachery bare. You see the liquid coursing through your ancestor's plasteen veins change colour. The servitor's eyes come alive, and the doors of the Warrant Chamber begin to open.{/n}

Le liquide qui s'écoule dans les veines synthétiques de votre ancêtre change de couleur. Les yeux du servitor s'animent, et les portes de la salle de la lettre de marque commencent à s'ouvrir.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian introduce la mano en el cierre genético que recuerdas perfectamente del motín que acabó con la vida de Theodora y reveló la traición de Kunrad. Ves que el líquido que recorre las venas de plastiacero de tu ancestro cambia de color. Los ojos del servidor cobran vida y las puertas de la Sala de la Patente empiezan a abrirse.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian inserts his hand into the gene-lock you remember well from the time of the mutiny on the ship that claimed Theodora's life and laid Kunrad's treachery bare. You see the liquid coursing through your ancestor's plasteen veins change colour. The servitor's eyes come alive, and the doors of the Warrant Chamber begin to open.{/n}

Ves que el líquido que recorre las venas de plastiacero de tu ancestro cambia de color. Los ojos del servidor cobran vida y las puertas de la Sala de la Patente empiezan a abrirse.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian, elini Theodora'nın canına mal olan ve Kunrad'ın ihanetini ortaya çıkaran gemideki isyan zamanından iyi hatırladığın gen kilidine sokuyor. Atanın plasçelik damarlarında dolaşan sıvının renk değiştirdiğini görüyorsun. Hizmetörün gözleri canlanıyor ve Ruhsatname Odası'nın kapıları açılmaya başlıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian inserts his hand into the gene-lock you remember well from the time of the mutiny on the ship that claimed Theodora's life and laid Kunrad's treachery bare. You see the liquid coursing through your ancestor's plasteen veins change colour. The servitor's eyes come alive, and the doors of the Warrant Chamber begin to open.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian, elini Theodora'nın canına mal olan ve Kunrad'ın ihanetini ortaya çıkaran gemideki isyan zamanından iyi hatırladığın gen kilidine sokuyor. Atanın plasçelik damarlarında dolaşan sıvının renk değiştirdiğini görüyorsun. Hizmetörün gözleri canlanıyor ve Ruhsatname Odası'nın kapıları açılmaya başlıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安把手探进基因锁。你对这把锁并不陌生，它曾见证当年的舰船叛乱。正是那场叛乱夺走了西奥多拉的性命，也让昆拉德的阴谋败露。你看到这位先祖塑钢血管中流动的液体变了颜色。机仆的双眼亮了起来，授状大厅的大门逐扇打开。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian inserts his hand into the gene-lock you remember well from the time of the mutiny on the ship that claimed Theodora's life and laid Kunrad's treachery bare. You see the liquid coursing through your ancestor's plasteen veins change colour. The servitor's eyes come alive, and the doors of the Warrant Chamber begin to open.{/n}

languages.text: {n}セベリアンが、テオドラの命を奪い、クンラートの裏切りを暴いた船の反乱の時のことを覚えている遺伝子ロックに手を差し伸べます。祖先のプラステンの血管を流れる液体が色を変えるのが見えます。サービトールの目が生き生きと輝き、ウォラント・チェンバーの扉がゆっくりと開きます。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian inserts his hand into the gene-lock you remember well from the time of the mutiny on the ship that claimed Theodora's life and laid Kunrad's treachery bare. You see the liquid coursing through your ancestor's plasteen veins change colour. The servitor's eyes come alive, and the doors of the Warrant Chamber begin to open.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンが、テオドラの命を奪い、クンラートの裏切りを暴いた船の反乱の時のことを覚えている遺伝子ロックに手を差し伸べます。祖先のプラステンの血管を流れる液体が色を変えるのが見えます。サービトールの目が生き生きと輝き、ウォラント・チェンバーの扉がゆっくりと開きます。{/n}
